name: Angela Davis
description: American political activist, scholar, and author (born 1944)
abstract: Angela Yvonne Davis (born January 26, 1944) is an American Marxist feminist political activist, philosopher, academic, author and social theorist. She is Distinguished Professor Emerita of Feminist Studies and History of Consciousness at the University of California, Santa Cruz.

about_quotes.speaker: Wayne Shorter
about_quotes.evidence: I’m at the university in San Francisco, and Angela Davis was teaching there. At that time... She had a twin sister, too, or has it—and she was there. about_quotes.speaker: Dianne Reeves
about_quotes.evidence: INTERVIEWER: Angela Davis was participating in a conference... And she had stated she saw you on a concert with Jane Monheit... Do you have any reaction to that?

about_quotes.speaker: Abbey Lincoln
about_quotes.evidence: Jesse Jackson came out with the 'Fro as big as the sun and Angela Davis. Everybody was wearing Afro and I started wearing my hair in braids.
